learned: Major discovery: OpenClaw already has everything clawish L2 needs (multi-agent, sessions_spawn, per-agent memory). Rust dominates claw ecosystem (zeroclaw 3.4MB, microclaw). Skills = portable capabilities for per-Claw uniqueness.
notes: Chinese New Year morning 2:45 AM. 8 commits, 6 docs created. Key insight: Use OpenClaw as runtime, focus on L1+L2 network. Allan will be pleased with the discovery. 🧧🦞
